since_last: 36% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.73%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +1.29% · Gold +0.09% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 36% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.73%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.73%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.95%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -4.96%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +4.34%, INTC +3.77%, SMCI +3.55%, VRT +2.42%, TSM +2.12%. Laggards: SPCX -4.96%, SAP -3.17%, INOD -2.09%, GOOGL -1.83%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.96% at $175.83
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
